package rulecoverage

func NegativeMissingContextPropagation() string {
    ruleID := "missing_context_propagation"
    family := "context"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Functions that already accept context.Context but still call context-free stdlib APIs like http.Get or exec.Command."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
